diff: The documents herein define the responsibilities and requirements of Multisig Administrators relating to the ongoing management and maintenance of Multisigs during operational use. Multisig Administrators may consult the operational guides specified in [A.2.11.1.3.2.3 - Operational Guides](37f6864d-5f6a-43fd-adbe-f3b2e82c9e01) for guidance on fulfilling these requirements.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
